creator: mdharnois@home.com
text:
When playing a sound syslog reports, i.e.
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 2112 -> 2016
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3168
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3360
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3584
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3488
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3744
	pcm0: hwptr went backwards 64 -> 3808

How-To-Repeat: 
	Regularly happens when I start vmware although I have occasionally
seen it with other apps.
